title: Neutrophil isolation protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"zwelr","text":"This protocol presents methods for the isolation of untouched neutrophils from whole blood drawn by standard phlebotomy using magnetic-assisted cell separation. Leveraging the STEMCELL Technologies EasySep™ Direct Human Neutrophil Isolation Kit, and its corresponding magnet, for selective targeting of non-neutrophil populations, this protocol may be inserted in the beginning of any workflow involving fresh anticoagulated whole blood, such as isolation of peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMC). This workflow minimizes cellular activation and preserves native neutrophil phenotype and function. The enriched neutrophil fraction is suitable for downstream nucleic acid and/or protein extraction to enable assessment of neutrophil-specific states. This protocol supplements original work published by STEMCELL Technologies, Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Carefully remove biospecimen tube rubber stopper and place upside down in tissue culture hood to minimize potential for mess.
Add 50 µL STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ Neutrophil Isolation Cocktail Contributed by users to sample in tube #1.
Add 50 µL STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ RapidSpheres™ Contributed by users to sample in tube #1.
Gently pipette to mix 2-3 times using mechanical pipette with p1000 wide-bore tip and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .
Using a 5 mL pipette tip, add 2.9 mL 1 millimolar (mM) EDTA Contributed by users in 1X PBS Contributed by users and pipette gently to mix (total volume 4 ml).
Place tube #1 into the STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ Magnet Contributed by users and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

Pour tube #1 cell suspension, by inverting the magnet containing tube #1 and its contents in one continuous motion, into tube #2. Invert completely. Do not shake. Some liquid will remain behind. The cell suspension at this step may contain a significant amount of red blood cells and may continue to look similar to whole blood.
Add 50 µL STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ RapidSpheres™ Contributed by users to tube #2 containing the enriched cells.
Gently pipette to mix 2-3 times using a 5 mL pipette tip to mix and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .
Place tube #2 into the STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ Magnet Contributed by users and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

Pour tube #2 cell suspension, by inverting the magnet containing tube #2 and its contents in one continuous motion, into tube #3. To minimize contamination, pour along a clean area of tube #2, avoiding the specific sidewall path used during the transfer from tube #1.
Place tube #3 into the STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ Magnet Contributed by users and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

Pour tube #3 cell suspension, by inverting the magnet containing tube #3 and its contents in one continuous motion, into a labeled 15 mL conical tube. To minimize contamination, pour along a clean area of tube #3, avoiding the specific sidewall path used during the transfer from tube #2.

Aliquot 10 µL enriched neutrophil suspension into prepared Trypan Blue Contributed by users microcentrifuge tube for counting. Volume of suspended cells will be variable dependent on transfer efficiencies. Undiluted cell counts are intended to be informative, not conclusive.

For standard neutrophil isolation methods, please see STEMCELL Technologies, Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada, EasySep‱ Direct Human Neutrophil Isolation Kit Instructions, 2025. Available from: Manufacturer website.
Obtain whole blood drawn into ACD or EDTA phlebotomy tube.
Allow biospecimen to come to Room temperature ( 00:30:00 post-draw) and briefly spin to remove residual whole blood from the top of tube.
Clean and sanitize tissue culture hood with 70% ethanol Contributed by users , wipe down with Kimwipe, and UV sterilize.

Spray phlebotomy tube, STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ Magnet Contributed by users , and STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ Direct Human Neutrophil Isolation Kit Contributed by users reagents into tissue culture hood with 70% ethanol Contributed by users .
Gently pipette total volume of whole blood into labeled 50 mL conical with 10 mL pipette tip to ensure blood is uniform prior to sampling for neutrophil isolation procedure.
Prepare isolation kit tubes and reagents in tissue culture hood:
Label 3x 5 mL (12 x 75 mm) polystyrene round-bottom tubes per sample as “#1”, “#2”, and “#3”.
1 x 15 mL conical tube per sample.
Supplement 5 mL 1x PBS with 10 µL 0.5 Molarity (M) EDTA Contributed by users per sample (final concentration 1 millimolar (mM) EDTA Contributed by users ).
10 µL Trypan Blue Contributed by users (diluted 1:25 in 1X PBS Contributed by users ) in microcentrifuge tube.
STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ RapidSpheres™ Contributed by users , vortexed at high speed for 00:00:30 to mix.
Aliquot 2 µL of 0.5 Molarity (M) EDTA Contributed by users into round-bottom tube #1. IMPORTANT: Skip this step if beginning with whole blood collected in EDTA phlebotomy tube.
Continue with STEMCELL Technologies, EasySep™ Direct Human Neutrophil Isolation Kit Contributed by users in tissue culture hood.

If supplementing with 2 µL of 0.5 Molarity (M) EDTA Contributed by users , gently pipette to mix 2-3 times with the same p1000 wide-bore tip to evenly distribute throughout sample (final EDTA Contributed by users concentration 1 millimolar (mM) ). Be sure to remove whole blood slowly and evenly from tip to minimize loss.

Using a mechanical pipette with p1000 wide-bore tip, slowly remove 998 µL whole blood from the 50 mL conical tube and transfer to tube #1. Be sure to remove whole blood slowly and evenly from tip to minimize loss.
Proceed with PBMC isolation or other primary phlebotomy tube application using the remaining whole blood volume.
Record all observations and storage locations in secure spreadsheet or LIMS database system.
Resuspend cells in appropriate buffer for downstream applications according to study goals. Intact cells are not intended to be stored at any temperature for any duration of time.
Remove supernatant with a p1000 with regular-bore tip and discard in 10% Bleach Contributed by users waste container.
Centrifuge the enriched neutrophil suspension at 300 x g, °C, 5 minutes .
10% Bleach Contributed by users in waste container.
creator: Taylor Johnson
